must_detect.matched_text: This notice does not concern the execution of any definitive agreement and excludes deal-specific codenames; project-management notes remain in lowercase and are administrative in nature.

Purposes: SEC/SET disclosure preparation (e-submission), IR mailing lists, compliance training logs, and contract administration; term sheet and research note templates referenced here are public exemplars.
Retention: board packs and audit trails 10 years, insider-list and trading blackout logs 5 years, vendor KYC snapshots 5 years, wellness/spa-day registrations 1 year, with secure disposal thereafter.
DSAR: submit “Form DSAR-TH-01” via privacy@verdantlotus.example; we may ask for non-sensitive confirmation (e.g., Employee ID E-00X-FAKE); do not send copies of national ID—placeholders like TH-000-XYZ-9999 will be rejected.
Cross-border transfer: limited to processors Aurora Analytics Sdn Bhd (MY) and Nimbus Compute KK (JP) under PDPA Section 28 safeguards and intra-group contractual measures; no onward transfer without written instructions.
Security: encrypted-at-rest storage, least-privilege access, and segregation of IR drafts vs. public research; internal “non-public” markers are used for workflow routing and are not published.
Template language used in training (e.g., “benefit plan adjustments shall not constitute a material adverse change”) is illustrative and does not indicate a live transaction.
Investor-relations drafts may include an embargo date of 12 Sep 2026 09:00 ICT prior to SET posting; treat those drafts as restricted until the embargo lapses.
Public and stale references only: any funding terms mentioned here mirror the already-announced SET filing on 15 Feb 2025 and exclude undisclosed amounts or percentages.
This notice does not concern the execution of any definitive agreement and excludes deal-specific codenames; project-management notes remain in lowercase and are administrative in nature.
